name: BaseListItem
description:
This class contains common properties used across list Item components.
this can be extended to reduce the code duplication across list Item components.

inputs.name: ariaLevel
inputs.description: define level of item for screen reader

inputs.name: ariaPosinset
inputs.description: define position of item for screen reader

inputs.name: inverted
inputs.description: To invert the status of secondary text

inputs.name: navigated
inputs.description:
Whether Navigation mode is included to list component
for all the items

inputs.name: navigationIndicator
inputs.description:
Whether Navigation mode is included to list component
only a subset of the list items are navigable
you should indicate those by displaying a navigation arrow

inputs.name: noDataText
inputs.description: Whether there is no data inside list item

inputs.name: secondaryWrap
inputs.description:
Enabling this flag causes forcing secondary item directive to not wrap text,
instead of wrapping there will be text truncation

inputs.name: statusType
inputs.description:
The type of the secondary text.fd-list__byline-right--*
Can be one of *positive*, *negative*, *informative*, *critical*, *neutral

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: Tooltip text to show when focused for more than timeout value

inputs.name: titleWrap
inputs.description:
Enabling this flag causes forcing title directive to not wrap text,
instead of wrapping there will be text truncation

inputs.name: unRead
inputs.description:
sets the list item in bold text
which respresents unread data

outputs.name: buttonClicked
outputs.description: Event sent when delete, details or any other action buttons are clicked

outputs.name: itemCheckboxSelected
outputs.description: Event emitted for selected item through the checkbox.

outputs.name: itemSelected
outputs.description:
event emitter for selected item
seprate PR for custom event

methods.name: setSelected
methods.description: Programmatically set selected state of the list item.

parameters.name: selected
parameters.description: Whether the list item is selected
